items.name_en: New arrival printed hourglass bag large ☀ Balenciaga Paris,👉 This season's heavy hitter pearlescent hourglass bag, unique iconic curved shape is highly recognizable 💗, instantly eye-catching and super cool, appearance presents a crescent moon shape 💘 with a metal B-shaped ring ✨, cowhide texture is also very impressive and full of style, daily essentials or carefully selected versatile and trendy, this Parisian hourglass bag will definitely explode in popularity this year, elegant exquisite and unique, instantly eye-catching, hard not to be noticed ⚠ 😄, handheld or crossbody looks amazing 😍, absolutely a goddess' favorite, of course I love it to death! Can be salty or sweet, that's the effect. Capacity tested: phone, coin purse, compact powder, lipstick, power bank, keys, small pack of tissues, all can be easily loaded, inspection available. Size: Large 23-10-14cm
